title: Runner & QMT Gateway Operational Use-Case Baseline
summary: CR138 closed current delivery as READY_WITH_RISK after CP8 user approval on 2026-06-24. CP6 implementation PASS and CP7 fixture/static verification PASS_WITH_RISK are complete for all 8 stories. Current closure covers local Runner Control Plane and QMT Gateway Service Layer contracts, fixture tests, docs, hygiene guardrail, no-real-operation counters, and targeted regressions. It does not authorize or verify real QMT/MiniQMT/XtQuant/gateway runtime, credentials, account/market/order reads, submit/cancel, simulation/live, NAS, provider/lake/catalog, or Git remote. Follow-up candidates CR138-FU-RT-01, CR138-FU-RT-02, CR138-FU-TRD-01, and CR138-FU-GOV-01 remain candidates only and are not started.
